creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: Patience is required here. Ed will do MFC of OpenSSH 8.8p1 to stable/13 and not only ssh will be updated but also libs required to have 2FA ssh with FIDO2 support will be added. It's going to be a set of MFCs which has to be precisely prepared, so it takes some effort.
